component.name: @@NAME_LONG@@
component.summary: Compyle Code. Premium code editing, AI-native, privacy-first.

description.p: Compyle Code is a premium open-source IDE built on Code - OSS. It features a built-in AI assistant (Compyle Brain), Open VSX extension registry, privacy-first telemetry defaults, a large theme gallery, and a rich developer experience. Compyle Code is not affiliated with Microsoft.

screenshot.caption: Compyle Code - Premium AI-native code editor
